etymology.description: 心(心) (xīn, "heart") + 囪(囪) (cōng, "chimney") forms a composite suggesting intelligence
etymology.interpretation: The character 悤 (cōng, "clever") originally depicted a heart with a distinctive mark indicating a hole, which is a traditional way to convey intelligence. The later form 囪 (cōng, "chimney") developed as a patterned evolution of this dot, leading to the character’s association with mental sharpness. The association with speed or hastiness likely emerged later as a cultural adaptation of these ideas.
